The '''Great Mother River Restaurant''' was located aboard the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Ithorian Herdship|Herdship]] [[Bazaar (Ithorian Herdship)|''Bazaar'']] in [[Isttu Village]]. It was connected by skywalk to the nearby [[Great Mother River Hotel]]. Expensive and opulent, the Great Mother River Restaurant boasted top of the line cuisine, including 200 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]]-a-bottle [[champagne]].

{{Loc-stub}}
